---
title: "CosMx Tonsil strucutres - Differences"
author: "Samuel Gunz"
date:  last-modified
format: 
    html:
      toc: true
      self-contained: true
      highlight-style: github
      code-line-numbers: true
output-dir: "../docs/"
---
# Setup

```{r}
#| message: false
#| echo: false
library("SpatialExperiment")
library("sosta")
library("ggplot2")
library("tidyr")
library("dplyr")
library("sf")
library("smoothr")
library("spdep")
library("ggspavis")
library("mumosa")

theme_set(theme_bw())
```

Set up for plotting

```{r}
# custom order
.fw <- facet_wrap(~factor(typ, c("110_REF", "110_TVA1", "110_TVA2",
                                 "110_TVA3", "110_CRC")))

```

```{r}
# Specific color mapping - source: https://github.com/HelenaLC/WTx-TVA/blob/d75d0cd20a9880f11c1368e37ba39660e3f2e82c/code/_utils.R#L4
typCols <- c(
  "110_REF" = "seagreen",
  "110_TVA1" = "dodgerblue",
  "110_TVA2" = "royalblue",
  "110_TVA3" = "slateblue",
  "110_CRC" = "tomato"
)
```

Read in data

```{r}
spe <- readRDS("~/data_no_backup/CosMx_TVA/110.rds")
spe <- toSpatialExperiment(spe, spatialCoordsNames = c("CenterX_global_px", "CenterY_global_px"))
```


```{r}
# selected fov of interest
ls <- c(105, 106, 107, 108, 109, 110, 111,
        133, 134, 135, 136, 137, 138, 139,
        96, 97, 98,
        #25, 
        26,
        27, 28, 29, 30,
        #382, 383, 384,
        46, 47, 48, 49,
        50, 51, 
        #52,
        59, 60, 61, 62, 63, 64, 65,
        92, 93, 94, 95)

gc()
```


```{r}
#| fig-width: 5
#| fig-height: 9

cbind(spatialCoords(spe), colData(spe)) |>
  as.data.frame() |> 
  dplyr::filter(fil == TRUE) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = CenterX_global_px, y = CenterY_global_px, color = typ)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.15, stroke = 0) + 
  coord_equal() +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size=4))) +
  scale_color_manual(values = typCols)
```

```{r}
#| fig-width: 15
#| fig-height: 35
cbind(spatialCoords(spe), colData(spe)) |>
  as.data.frame() |> 
  dplyr::filter(fil == TRUE) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = CenterX_global_px, y = CenterY_global_px, color = lv1)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.5, stroke = 0) + 
  coord_equal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("navy", "gold", "firebrick")) +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size=3)))
```

```{r}
#| fig-width: 15
#| fig-height: 35
cbind(spatialCoords(spe), colData(spe)) |>
  as.data.frame() |> 
  dplyr::filter(fil == TRUE) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = CenterX_global_px, y = CenterY_global_px, color = fov)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.5, stroke = 0) + 
  coord_equal() +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size=3)))
```


# Structures per ROI

```{r}
spe$typ |> unique()
```


```{r}
#| eval: false

int <- shapeIntensityImage(
  spe[,!is.na(spe$typ)],
  marks = "lv1",
  imageCol = "typ",
  imageId = c("110_TVA1"),
  markSelect = "epi"
)
```


```{r}
params <- estimateReconstructionParametersSPE(
    spe,
    marks = "lv1",
    imageCol = "typ",
    markSelect = "epi",
    plotHist = TRUE,
    dim = 750
)
```


```{r}
mean(params$thres)
mean(params$bndw)
```

```{r}
resSub <- reconstructShapeDensityImage(
    spe,
    marks = "lv1",
    imageCol = "fov",
    imageId = ls,
    markSelect = "epi",
    bndw = 50,
    thres = 9.75E-5,
    dim = 750
)
```


```{r}
cs1 <- grDevices::colorRampPalette(pals::alphabet(26))(dim(resSub)[1])

resSub |>
    mutate(struct = (cs1)) |>
    ggplot() +
    geom_sf(aes(fill = struct, color = struct)) +
    guides(color = "none", fill = "none") +
    scale_color_manual(values = cs1) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = cs1) +
    theme_void()
```


```{r}
#| column: screen
#| out-width: 100%
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-heigth: 8 
spe |>
  (\(x) x[, colData(x)$fov %in% ls])() |>
  (\(x) cbind(spatialCoords(x), colData(x)))() |>
  as.data.frame() |>
  ggplot(aes(x = CenterX_global_px, y = CenterY_global_px, color = lv1)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.5, stroke = 0) +
  coord_equal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("steelblue", "lightgoldenrod", "orchid")) +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3))) +
  geom_sf(
    data = resSub,
    fill = NA,
    color = "black",
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    # this is important
    linewidth = 0.25
  )
```
# All structs

```{r}
spe$foo <- "foo"

structs <- reconstructShapeDensitySPE(
    spe,
    marks = "lv1",
    imageCol = "foo",
    markSelect = "epi",
    bndw = 50,
    thres = 9.75E-5,
    dim = 2500
)
```


```{r}
#| fig-width: 15
#| fig-height: 35
cs1 <- sample(unname(pals::alphabet(26)), dim(structs)[1], replace = TRUE)

structs |>
    mutate(struct = (cs1)) |>
    ggplot() +
    geom_sf(aes(fill = struct, color = struct)) +
    guides(color = "none", fill = "none") +
    scale_color_manual(values = cs1) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = cs1) +
    theme_void()
```

## Assign cells to strucutres

```{r}
#| eval: false
assign <- assingCellsToStructures(spe, structs,
    imageCol = "foo", nCores = 1
)
```
```{r}
library(parallel)
df <- .SPE2df(spe, "foo", colNames = TRUE)
#ls <- split(df, as.factor(df[, imageCol]))

blocks <- split(df, ceiling(seq_len(nrow(df)) / 10000))


res <- mclapply(blocks, function(dfSel) {
    structsSel <- structs
    spatialCoordsSf <- st_as_sf(dfSel[, c(1, 2)], coords = c(colnames(dfSel)[1], 
        colnames(dfSel)[2]))
    n <- st_intersects(spatialCoordsSf, structsSel, sparse = FALSE)
    n_list <- apply(n, 1, function(x) which(x == TRUE)[1])
    res <- ifelse(n_list == 0, NA, structsSel[["structID"]][n_list])
    return(data.frame(colnamesSPE = dfSel$colnamesSPE, structAssign = res))
}, mc.cores = 5)

rd <- do.call("rbind", res)
out <- rd$structAssign
names(out) <- rd$colnamesSPE
```


```{r}
colData(spe)$structAssign <- out[colnames(spe)]
```

```{r}
#| fig-width: 15
#| fig-height: 25
cbind(spatialCoords(spe), colData(spe)) |>
  as.data.frame() |> 
  dplyr::filter(fil == TRUE & fov %in% ls) |> 
  #dplyr::filter(!is.na(structAssign)) |> 
  dplyr::filter(lv1 == "epi") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = CenterX_global_px, y = CenterY_global_px, color = structAssign)) +
  geom_point(size = 1, stroke = 0) + 
  coord_equal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(cs1)) +
  guides(colour = "none") +
    geom_sf(
    data = resSub,
    fill = NA,
    color = "navy",
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    # this is important
    linewidth = 0.75
  )
```

# Struct metrics

```{r}
shapeMetrics <- totalShapeMetrics(structs)
```

```{r}
#| fig-width: 15
#| fig-height: 35
cbind(structs, t(shapeMetrics)) |>
    ggplot() +
    geom_sf(aes(fill = fibreWidth, color = fibreWidth)) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "A") +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "A")
```

```{r}
shapeMetricsSub <- totalShapeMetrics(resSub)
```


```{r}
#| fig-width: 15
#| fig-height: 35
cbind(resSub, t(shapeMetricsSub)) |>
    ggplot() +
    geom_sf(aes(fill = fibreWidth, color = fibreWidth)) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "A") +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "A")
```

# Filter structs

```{r}
(fq <- quantile(shapeMetrics["Area",], c(0.4)))
```

```{r}
#| fig-width: 15
#| fig-height: 35
cbind(resSub, t(shapeMetricsSub)) |>
  filter(Area > fq[1]) |> 
    ggplot() +
    geom_sf(aes(fill = Area, color = Area)) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "C") +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "C")
```

```{r}
filts <- names(which(shapeMetrics["Area", ] > fq[1]))
spe$structAssignFilt <- ifelse(spe$structAssign %in% filts, spe$structAssign, NA)
```

```{r}
#| fig-width: 15
#| fig-height: 20

cs1 <- sample(unname(pals::alphabet(26)), dim(structs)[1], replace = TRUE)


cbind(spatialCoords(spe), colData(spe)) |>
  as.data.frame() |> 
  dplyr::filter(fil == TRUE & fov %in% ls) |> 
  #dplyr::filter(!is.na(structAssign)) |> 
  dplyr::filter(lv1 == "epi") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = CenterX_global_px, y = CenterY_global_px, color = structAssignFilt)) +
  geom_point(size = 1, stroke = 0) + 
  coord_equal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(cs1)) +
  guides(colour = "none") +
    geom_sf(
    data = resSub,
    fill = NA,
    color = "navy",
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    # this is important
    linewidth = 0.75
  )
```

# Metrics

```{r}
# Specific color mapping - source: https://github.com/HelenaLC/WTx-TVA/blob/d75d0cd20a9880f11c1368e37ba39660e3f2e82c/code/_utils.R#L4
sm <- shapeMetrics |> 
  t() |> 
  as.data.frame() |> 
  tibble::rownames_to_column("structAssign")

df <- colData(spe)[!is.na(spe$structAssignFilt),] |> 
  as.data.frame() |> 
  left_join(sm, by = "structAssign" )
```

```{r}
colData(spe) |> 
  as.data.frame() |> 
  filter(lv1 == "epi") |> 
  select(lv2) |>
  pull() |> 
  unique() |> 
  as.character() -> namesLv2

lv2Cols <- pals::trubetskoy(length(namesLv2))
names(lv2Cols) <- sort(namesLv2)
```


```{r}
df |> 
  filter(lv1 == "epi") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(lv2, fibreWidth), y = fibreWidth, fill = lv2)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.85) +
  theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x=element_blank()) +
  labs(fill = "") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = lv2Cols) +
  labs(title = "Fibre width per cell in different epi cell types")
```


```{r}
#| fig-width: 15
#| fig-height: 35
cbind(spatialCoords(spe), colData(spe)) |>
  as.data.frame() |> 
  filter(lv1 == "epi") |> 
  filter(!is.na(structAssignFilt)) |> 
  dplyr::filter(is.na(typ)) |> 
  #dplyr::filter(!is.na(structAssign)) |> 
  dplyr::filter(lv1 == "epi") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = CenterX_global_px, y = CenterY_global_px)) +
  geom_point(size = 1, stroke = 0) + 
  coord_equal() +
      geom_sf(
    data = structs,
    fill = NA,
    color = "navy",
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    # this is important
    linewidth = 0.75
  )
```



```{r}
df |> 
  filter(lv1 == "epi") |> 
  filter(!is.na(structAssignFilt)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(typ, fibreWidth), y = fibreWidth, fill = typ)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.85) +
  theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x=element_blank()) +
  labs(fill = "") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = typCols) +
  labs(title = "Fibre width per cell in different regions")
```
```{r}
# custom order
.fw <- facet_wrap(~factor(typ, c("110_REF", "110_TVA1", "110_TVA2",
                                 "110_TVA3", "110_CRC")))

```

```{r}
df |> 
  filter(lv1 == "epi") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = trj, y = fibreWidth, color = typ)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(color = "") +
  scale_color_manual(values = typCols) +
  .fw
```


```{r}
df |> 
  filter(lv1 == "epi") |> 
  group_by(structAssign) |> 
  reframe(medianTrj = median(trj), medianFibreWitdh = median(fibreWidth), typ = typ) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = medianFibreWitdh, y = medianTrj, color = typ)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(color = "") +
  scale_color_manual(values = typCols) +
  labs(title = "Median trajectory vs. mean fibre width per structure") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black") +
  .fw
```

```{r}
df |> 
  filter(lv1 == "epi") |> 
  group_by(structAssign) |> 
  reframe(medianPanCK = median(Mean.PanCK), medianFibreWitdh = median(fibreWidth), typ = typ) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = medianFibreWitdh, y = medianPanCK, color = typ)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(color = "") +
  scale_color_manual(values = typCols) +
  labs(title = "Median panCK vs. mean fibre width per structure") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "black") +
  .fw
```

# Proportions

```{r}
propsTyp <- cellTypeProportions(spe[, !is.na(spe$typ)], "structAssignFilt", "typ", nCores = 4)
```


```{r}
propsTyp %>%
  filter(if_any(everything(), ~ . < 0.99 & . > 0.01)) -> propsel
```


```{r}
propsel |> 
  tibble::rownames_to_column("structAssign") |>
  left_join(sm, by = "structAssign") |> 
  arrange(desc(Area))
```

```{r}
cbind(spatialCoords(spe), colData(spe)) |>
  as.data.frame() |> 
  filter(structAssignFilt == "foo_10638") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = CenterX_global_px, y = CenterY_global_px, color = typ)) +
  geom_point(size = 1, stroke = 0) + 
  coord_equal() +
      geom_sf(
    data = structs[structs$structID == "foo_10638",],
    fill = NA,
    color = "navy",
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    # this is important
    linewidth = 0.75
  )
```

```{r}
spe$trans <- "no"
spe$trans[spe$structAssignFilt %in% rownames(propsel)] <- "yes"
```


```{r}
#| fig-width: 15
#| fig-height: 35

trp <- "RT|RC|TT|TC|T2C"

cbind(spatialCoords(spe), colData(spe)) |>
  as.data.frame() |> 
  dplyr::filter(fil == TRUE) |> 
  mutate(transCrpyt = case_when(
    stringr::str_detect(roi, trp) & trans == "yes" ~ "both",
    stringr::str_detect(roi, trp) ~ "original_annotation",
    trans == "yes" ~ "sosta_only",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = CenterX_global_px, y = CenterY_global_px, color = transCrpyt)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.5, stroke = 0) + 
  coord_equal() +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size=5))) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("darkred", "gold", "navy"))
```

```{r}
#| fig-width: 15
#| fig-height: 35
cbind(spatialCoords(spe), colData(spe)) |>
  as.data.frame() |> 
  dplyr::filter(fil == TRUE) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = CenterX_global_px, y = CenterY_global_px, color = trans)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.5, stroke = 0) + 
  coord_equal() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("steelblue", "darkred")) +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size=3)))
```
```{r}
#| fig-width: 15
#| fig-height: 35
cbind(spatialCoords(spe), colData(spe)) |>
  as.data.frame() |> 
  dplyr::filter(fil == TRUE) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = CenterX_global_px, y = CenterY_global_px, color = roi)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.5, stroke = 0) + 
  coord_equal() +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size=3)))
```

# Aggregate across cells

```{r}
library("BiocParallel")
library("scater")
bpparam <- MulticoreParam(6)

out <- aggregateAcrossCells(spe, spe$structAssignFilt,
                     statistics = "prop.detected",
                     BPPARAM = bpparam)
```

Merge with structure metrics

```{r}
aggMet <- t(shapeMetrics) |> 
  as.data.frame() |> 
  tibble::rownames_to_column("ids") |> 
  rename(structArea = Area ) |> 
  right_join(as.data.frame(colData(out)), by = "ids") |> 
  tibble::column_to_rownames("ids")
```

## Prop detectedd

```{r}
feats <- c("structArea", "Compactness", "Eccentricity", "Circularity",
                 "Solidity", "Curl", "fibreLength", "fibreWidth")


geneCors <- computeCorrelations(counts(out),
                    t(as.matrix(aggMet[out$ids, feats])),
                    BPPARAM = bpparam
                    )
```

```{r}
selG <- names(which(rowSums(counts(out)) / dim(out)[2] > 0.1))

"OLFM4" %in% selG
```



```{r}
sign_corrs <- geneCors[!is.na(geneCors$FDR),]
sign_corrs <- sign_corrs[sign_corrs$FDR < 0.1,]
sign_corrs <- sign_corrs[order(abs(sign_corrs$rho), decreasing = TRUE),]
```

```{r}
sel.correlcation <- sign_corrs[sign_corrs$feature2 %in% c("fibreWidth"),]

sel.correlcation |>
  as.data.frame() |> 
  filter(feature1 %in% selG) |> 
  arrange(desc(rho)) |> 
  head(n = 20)
```

```{r}
#| fig-width: 15
#| fig-height: 35
plotCoords(spe,
          annotate = "RNF44",
          in_tissue = NULL,
          y_reverse = FALSE)
```

## Bulk Sum

```{r}
outSum <- aggregateAcrossCells(spe, spe$structAssignFilt,
                     statistics = "sum",
                     BPPARAM = bpparam)
```


```{r}
geneCorsSum <- computeCorrelations(counts(outSum),
                    t(as.matrix(aggMet[out$ids, feats])),
                    BPPARAM = bpparam
                    )
```

```{r}
gene_corrs_Sum <- geneCorsSum[!is.na(geneCorsSum$FDR),]
gene_corrs_Sum <- gene_corrs_Sum[gene_corrs_Sum$FDR < 0.1,]
gene_corrs_Sum <- gene_corrs_Sum[order(abs(gene_corrs_Sum$rho), decreasing = TRUE),]

gene_corrs_Sum
```

```{r}
sel.correlcationSum <- gene_corrs_Sum[gene_corrs_Sum$feature2 %in% c("fibreWidth"),]

sel.correlcationSum |>
  as.data.frame() |> 
  arrange(desc(rho)) |> 
  head(n = 20)
```

```{r}
gene_corrs_Sum[gene_corrs_Sum$feature1 == "OLFM4",]
```

```{r}
#| fig-width: 15
#| fig-height: 35
plotCoords(spe,
          annotate = "RSPH1",
          in_tissue = NULL,
          y_reverse = FALSE)
```

```{r}
plotCoords(outSum,
          annotate = "SPEG",
          in_tissue = NULL,
          y_reverse = FALSE)
```
## Bulk Mean

```{r}
outMean <- aggregateAcrossCells(spe, spe$structAssignFilt,
                     statistics = "mean",
                     BPPARAM = bpparam)
```


```{r}
geneCorsMean <- computeCorrelations(counts(outMean),
                    t(as.matrix(aggMet[out$ids, feats])),
                    BPPARAM = bpparam
                    )
```

```{r}
gene_corrs_Mean <- geneCorsMean[!is.na(geneCorsMean$FDR),]
gene_corrs_Mean <- gene_corrs_Mean[gene_corrs_Mean$FDR < 0.1,]
gene_corrs_Mean <- gene_corrs_Mean[order(abs(gene_corrs_Mean$rho), decreasing = TRUE),]

gene_corrs_Mean
```

```{r}
sel.correlcationMean <- gene_corrs_Mean[gene_corrs_Mean$feature2 %in% c("fibreWidth"),]

sel.correlcationMean |>
  as.data.frame() |> 
  arrange(rho) |> 
  filter(feature1 %in% selG) |> 
  tail(n = 20)
```


```{r}
#| fig-width: 15
#| fig-height: 35
plotCoords(spe,
          annotate = "ORC1",
          in_tissue = NULL,
          y_reverse = FALSE)
```
